title: TexasHoldemState
description: Per-player state delivered in server_action_request.data.state (and server_game_state.data.state) when game == 'texas_holdem'. Built by games/texasholdem/texasholdem.go GetPlayerView(). Mixes **public fields** (visible to all: phase, community_cards, pot, etc.) with **private fields** (only visible to recipient: your_hand, your_chips, your_bet, etc.). At showdown (phase == 'done'), all non-folded players' hole cards are revealed via optional `player_N_hand` fields.

phase.description: Current hand phase. 'showdown' = cards compared, 'done' = match fully complete.

items.description: Card notation: rank (2-9, T, J, Q, K, A) + suit (c, d, h, s). E.g. 'Ah' = Ace of hearts.

community_cards.description: 0 cards preflop; 3 on flop; 4 on turn; 5 on river.

pot.description: Total chips in all pots (main + any side pots) this hand.

current_bet.description: The highest bet any player has contributed this betting round. To continue, you must match this (by call/raise/allin) or fold.

dealer.description: Seat index of the dealer button this hand.

dealer_id.description: Player ID of the dealer this hand.

current_player_id.description: Player ID currently on the action. Omitted when hand is over or match is done.

action_order.description: Player IDs in the order they are expected to act this phase (clockwise from first-to-act, busted players removed). Omitted at showdown/done.

your_bet.description: **PRIVATE.** Chips you've committed this round (not total-hand).
